resources.string: Couldn\'t reach the network. Check your connection and try again.
The server had a problem loading the quiz. Please try again.
Something went wrong. Please try again.

plurals.name: streak_badge_active_description
plurals.item: Streak badge lit: %1$d correct answer in a row
Streak badge lit: %1$d correct answers in a row

plurals.name: streak_badge_inactive_description
plurals.item: Streak: %1$d correct answer in a row
Streak: %1$d correct answers in a row

resources.string: Light theme active. Tap to switch to dark theme.
Dark theme active. Tap to switch to automatic theme.
Automatic theme active. Tap to switch to light theme.
Dynamic wallpaper color on. Tap to switch to the app\'s default colors.
App default colors active. Tap to switch to dynamic wallpaper color.
